description: An email marketer needs to assemble and write the content for the weekly newsletter.

nodes.task_description: Select the top 3 blog posts from the past week to feature in the newsletter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the most popular recent content.

nodes.task_description: Write a short, engaging introduction for the newsletter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a compelling opening paragraph.

nodes.task_description: Assemble the newsletter in the email marketing platform, including the intro, links to the blog posts, and a featured product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent builds the complete newsletter in the email tool, ready for sending.
